description: This pipeline visualizes data by grouping incoming information based on annotations, allowing for the creation of groups consisting of one data item per slot, and then outputs the result as a visualization.

df5227e6-3b64-4b39-9c14-72278078aaa6.name: trackmate-visualize-tracks
df5227e6-3b64-4b39-9c14-72278078aaa6.description:
Visualizes tracks

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

7802c79b-e08f-416d-a1ff-d83f7d1ebb0d.description:
Visualizes spots

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
